mechanism: The repo turns repo outcomes into review prompts for pillar records. Missed reports leave pillar drift hidden.
The hub ledger tests whether agent workflows can preserve state across long edits. Missed ledger updates weaken the premise.
The DEC ledger tests whether proposal status and evidence links reduce false certainty in specs.
The serial tests whether sustained agent-assisted prose work can produce publishable inventory.
The tracker is the source that records whether pillar claims are confirming, weakening, or invalidated.

reason: Repo has no non-orphan pillar coupling.
prompt: Decide whether this repo needs a pillar link or should stay uncoupled.

reason: Pillar has no non-orphan repo coupling.
prompt: Decide whether the pillar is active without a repo testing it.
